title: trichomanes eriophorum
intro: Trichomanes eriophorum, also known as the forked polypody or forked fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Trichomanes eriophorum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce inflammation in the body. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
